enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a casual vlog update after having a female guest stay for four days, recounting visits to a Buffalo Bill museum and hot springs in Idaho Springs. He discusses reading Black Elk's account of touring with Buffalo Bill, a minor medical procedure on his neck, and his plans to refocus on a Google Earth mapping project.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Can only make videos when alone; loses train of thought with others in the room
Finds them interesting as a window into what Indigenous people were thinking during that era
Gained weight from buying more varied food with his mom; plans to refocus on healthy eating
Plans to finish Boulder County by end of April and stay focused on it exclusively
